title: Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation
headline: Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of mindfulness / meditation examined brain & mechanisms.
keyFindings: See the linked paper for detailed results.
limitations: Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
The practice studied (mindfulness / meditation) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
simplifiedTitle: Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation
aiSnippet: Meta-analysis / Systematic review, Frontiers in neuroscience (2018). A meta-analysis / systematic review of mindfulness / meditation examined brain & mechanisms.
whyItMatters: MoM shares directed attention (the focused-attention component) with the practice studied here. Because the benefit is linked to that mechanism rather than to any one method, it's reasonable to expect it may extend to MoM as well — though MoM hasn't been studied directly for this outcome.
